Annotation

Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us
The patient shows evidence of impaired renal function (elevated creatinine, urea), mild metabolic acidosis (low CO₂), and mild hyperchloremia. Liver enzymes are mostly normal except for a slight ALT elevation. Lipid profile reveals hypertriglyceridemia, elevated LDL and HDL cholesterol. Other parameters are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and cardiovascular risk management.
Provider Organization: Centro Privado de Educación Especial Parálisis Cerebral Infantil
